note: Pele da Família (canon/PALETA-FAMILIA.md) — papel/tinta/couro/areia/oliva/verde profundo/ouro quente/terracota. JAMAIS obsidian (é ALSHAM). Lei da Imagem: gerar SOMENTE ambiente/atmosfera/textura/fundo/ornamento — nunca pessoa, rosto, o ônibus, capa, nem objeto real. Saídas otimizadas para .webp (responsivo, ~72q) antes de commitar. Gerador: fal.ai (flux-pro ultra) OU Ideogram (V_2 + negative_prompt) como fallback — cada peça revista pelo AUTEUR nos pixels.

pieces.name: paper-texture
pieces.prompt: Seamless tileable warm aged paper texture, cream linen paper color F4F1EA, subtle organic fibers and soft grain, gentle warm mottling, faint sand and ecru tones, even flat studio light, minimalist background surface, no people, no faces, no objects, no text, no logo, no watermark

pieces.name: atmosphere-cerrado
pieces.prompt: Cinematic editorial wide landscape of vast Brazilian cerrado savanna at golden hour, rolling grassland, a few twisted ipe trees, distant hills, warm low sun, deep olive-green foliage bathed in warm terracotta amber light, misty valley, volumetric god rays, soft film grain, muted painterly warm paper tones, reverent and timeless, no people, no faces, no animals, no vehicles, no text, no logo, no watermark

pieces.name: atmosphere-verde
pieces.prompt: Abstract atmospheric background, deep forest green 1A422D, soft volumetric fog and faint out-of-focus botanical leaf silhouettes, a few warm gold light motes, dark green tonal gradient, cinematic calm reverent haze, painterly minimalist, warm not cold, no people, no faces, no objects, no text, no logo, no watermark

pieces.name: atmosphere-expedicao
pieces.note: Atmosfera PRÓPRIA da página Expedição — 'o limiar da travessia'. Cortada em panorama pra remover clutter de primeiro plano (Lei da Imagem).
pieces.prompt: Cinematic editorial wide atmosphere of a vast layered Asian frontier landscape at warm misty dawn, distant terraced rice hills and rolling ridgelines fading into golden haze, a soft river bend catching first light, low warm sun, deep olive and jade greens washed in warm amber and terracotta light, volumetric mist between the ridges, soft film grain, muted painterly warm paper tones, a reverent sense of a long journey about to begin, no landmarks, no people, no faces, no animals, no vehicles, no boat, no monument, no text, no logo, no watermark

pieces.name: atmosphere-familia
pieces.prompt: Golden late-afternoon light streaming through a rustic wooden countryside veranda in the Brazilian cerrado, soft hearth glow, floating dust motes, olive greens and warm amber, a deep sense of home and belonging, empty and peaceful, warm paper tones — no people, no faces, no text

pieces.name: atmosphere-educacao
pieces.prompt: Cozy study nook, out-of-focus vintage world globe and old world map, warm candlelight, blurred blank notebooks and pencils, dust motes, worldschooling wonder, olive green and amber paper tones — no people, no readable text

pieces.name: atmosphere-fe
pieces.prompt: Warm golden light shafts descending through tall forest trees, a natural cathedral of trunks, volumetric mist, reverent calm, forest green and warm gold — no building, no church, no cross, no people, no text

pieces.name: atmosphere-saude
pieces.prompt: Open green field at misty dawn, dew on tall grass catching first warm light, fresh living green and warm gold, breath and vitality, soft volumetric mist — no people, no animals, no text

pieces.name: atmosphere-journal
pieces.prompt: Worn cream journal paper with a soft page fold and deckled edge, warm raking side light, ink and warm paper tones, intimate and quiet — no readable text, no people

pieces.name: atmosphere-bazar
pieces.prompt: Warm writer's atelier, out-of-focus wooden shelves with blurred leather-bound volumes and curated objects, brass desk lamp glow, paper and amber tones, craft and curation — no readable titles, no cover art, no people, no text
